summary_extracted: Middle East conflict threatens Strait of Hormuz and global energy supply; IMF projects 19% energy price increase and global growth of only 3.1% in 2026, with headline inflation at 4.4%. US tensions in Venezuela and NATO posture in Greenland add geopolitical complexity. Trade tariff uncertainty remains elevated. Oil prices fell May 1 on peace-deal progress via Pakistani mediators.
